steps.title: Avoid a second main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main verb is might yield. The blank must describe the cultural studies analysis without adding another finite verb that competes with that main verb.

steps.title: Use a modifier instead
steps.content:
• Choice A: Adds would focus as a second finite verb.
  • Choice B: Adds would be focusing as another finite verb phrase.
  • Choice C: Uses a participial phrase that modifies analysis.
  • Choice D: Adds focuses as a second main verb.
The answer is C.
